Shanghai Mandarin Excellence Programme — outfit planner

2–13 July 2026 · chaperone duty, casual but presentable · no laundry needed

Smart-lift day Outdoor / heat AC indoor Travel
2 Jul, Thu Outbound flight Travel

Top

Navy polo shirt

Bottom

Sage corduroy shorts

Shoes

White trainers

Recommended

White Air Force 1 style

Alternative

Navy/tan trainers

Alternative

Bring a light overshirt for the cabin — it's always colder than you expect on a 12-hour flight.

3 Jul, Fri Arrival, Opening Ceremony, campus tour Smart-lift

Top

Navy polo (travel outfit) or burgundy geometric shirt if you freshen up first

Bottom

Sage corduroy shorts

Shoes

White Air Force 1 style

Recommended

White trainers

Alternative

You'll likely land same-morning and go straight into Opening Ceremony — little time to change. The cleaner Air Force 1 look reads slightly smarter for ceremony photos.

4 Jul, Sat Lessons, Chinese games, Huangpu River Cruise (evening) Outdoor / heat

Top

Houndstooth-style patterned shirt (Autograph)

Bottom

Black Uniqlo sport shorts

Shoes

White trainers

Recommended

White Air Force 1 style

Alternative

Hat

Black Brixton snapback

Smarten up slightly for the evening river cruise photos.

5 Jul, Sun Lessons, Grand View Garden, Panlong Tiandi Outdoor / heat

Top

Blue/white stripe linen shirt

Bottom

Beige/stone shorts

Shoes

White trainers

Recommended

Navy/tan trainers

Alternative

Hat

Off-white/navy Brixton snapback

Long outdoor afternoon at the garden, then dinner and an evening visit — comfortable all day.

6 Jul, Mon Hanfu experience, Nanjing Road & The Bund (evening)

Top

Fine pinstripe shirt

Bottom

Black Uniqlo sport shorts

Shoes

White trainers

Recommended

White Air Force 1 style

Alternative

Check whether Hanfu is provided for the cultural session — you likely won't need your own outfit for that part.

7 Jul, Tue Local Chinese school visit, dinner out Smart-lift

Top

Burgundy geometric shirt

Bottom

Navy smart trousers

Shoes

White Air Force 1 style

Recommended

White trainers

Alternative

Representing MGSG to another school — trousers lift this above the usual shorts day. AF1s pair more cleanly with trousers than chunky trainers.

8 Jul, Wed Craft workshops, Chinese painting (indoor) AC indoor

Top

Iron Maiden tee (Eddie design)

Bottom

Sage corduroy shorts

Shoes

White trainers

Recommended

Navy/tan trainers

Alternative

Fully indoor, hands-on craft day — comfortable casual is fine.

9 Jul, Thu Zhujiajiao Ancient Town, Shanghai Museum, Acrobatic Show Outdoor / heat

Top

Dark diamond pattern shirt (M&S linen blend)

Bottom

Grey sport shorts

Shoes

Navy/tan trainers

Recommended

White trainers

Alternative

Hat

Black Brixton snapback

Long, hot, walking-heavy day on uneven stone streets. The navy/tan pair will show dust and scuffs far less than white over a full day of ancient-town cobbles.

10 Jul, Fri Bamboo weaving, songs, Tie-dye (indoor) AC indoor

Top

Led Zeppelin tee (Swan Song)

Bottom

Beige/stone shorts

Shoes

White trainers

Recommended

Navy/tan trainers

Alternative

Tie-dye workshop — wear something you don't mind risking a stray dye splash on. Consider the navy/tan pair here too, since white trainers are easiest to stain.

11 Jul, Sat UK Professionals meeting, closing rehearsal, Global Harbor shopping

Top

Fine pinstripe shirt

Bottom

Black Under Armour mesh shorts

Shoes

White Air Force 1 style

Recommended

White trainers

Alternative

Meeting with UK professionals in the morning nudges this slightly smarter than a free day.

12 Jul, Sun Closing Ceremony, Oriental Pearl Tower, dinner out Smart-lift

Top

Houndstooth-style patterned shirt

Bottom

Black smart trousers

Shoes

White Air Force 1 style

Recommended

White trainers

Alternative

Closing Ceremony — your final and strongest smart-lift day. AF1s are the cleanest pairing with trousers for the ceremony photos.

13 Jul, Mon Shanghai Zoo, packing, flight home Outdoor / heat

Top

Guns N' Roses tee

Bottom

Grey sport shorts

Shoes

Navy/tan trainers

Recommended

White trainers

Alternative

Hat

Black Brixton snapback

Hot zoo morning on dusty paths, then straight into packing and the flight home — the navy/tan pair hides the day's wear better than white for your last day.
